sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44695" key="eu)paraxw/rhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπαρα-χώρητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44695.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">readily admissible</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archim.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Quadr.Praef.</title_> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
